summary:
Hardened username sanitization to drop Unicode BIDI control characters before escaping so spoofing overrides cannot survive registration (`app/sanitizer.py:23-52`).  
Updated the admin access gate to compare the stored username against the allowlist (with refreshed docs) while keeping the rendered name only for messaging, blocking visual-override privilege escalation (`app/auth.py:133-151`).

Tests:
- `./test.sh`
